articles.title: AGENTIC AI ON THE RISE: KEYS TO UNLOCKING VALUE
articles.summary: When it comes to your business, don't overlook AI agents and the broad set of tasks they can help with.  The latest tools can help drive innovation and we found a helpful eBook [4] that explores how it's being done in the real world.

articles.title: today, you'll find guidance to simplify your AI agent journey.
DEEPMIND CEO SAYS CHINESE AI FIRMS ARE 6 MONTHS BEHIND THE WEST
articles.summary: Google DeepMind's CEO, Demis Hassabis, says that Chinese AI companies remain around six months behind the frontier AI of the leading Western labs. He says the response to DeepSeek's R1 model last year was a massive overreaction and that while Chinese firms are very good at catching up to the frontier, they have yet to show they can innovate beyond that. Some of the barriers to Chinese AI development are set to come down as the Trump administration is easing a ban on advanced AI chip exports to China. Sales of the most advanced AI processors will remain blocked on national security grounds.

articles.title: GEMINI IN CHROME IS GETTING “SKILLS” AS IT MOVES TOWARD BECOMING A FULL AI AGENT
articles.summary: Gemini in Chrome is being upgraded into a proactive agent capable of performing complex tasks on users' behalf. A hidden internal page for 'skills' has been spotted in testing. The page features a dedicated interface where users can define specific capabilities for the AI. Skills will effectively allow users to 'teach' Gemini how to handle specific or repetitive workflows within the browser.

articles.title: THE MESSY HUMAN DRAMA THAT DEALT A BLOW TO ONE OF AI'S HOTTEST STARTUPS
articles.summary: Mira Murati says that Barret Zoph was fired from Thinking Machines Lab after repeated concerns about his conduct and lack of productivity. Zoph claims he was fired for expressing an intent to take a job elsewhere. Within hours of Zoph's firing, Zoph, another co-founder, and a third employee had signed offers to rejoin OpenAI. The departures are a sign of how the AI race is as much a battle for talent as technology.

articles.title: AI STARTUP HUMANS& RAISES $480 MILLION AT $4.5 BILLION VALUATION IN SEED ROUND
articles.summary: AI startup Humans& has secured $480 million in seed funding, reaching a $4.5 billion valuation. Key participants included Nvidia, Jeff Bezos, and GV. The company aims to develop human-centric AI for improved communication and collaboration. A product launch is expected early this year. The founding team consists of experts from OpenAI, Google DeepMind, and Meta.

articles.title: WITHOUT BENCHMARKING LLMS, YOU'RE LIKELY OVERPAYING 5-10X
articles.summary: Those paying for LLM APIs and have never tested alternatives are likely overpaying. There are almost always cheaper options with comparable quality for every workflow. Benchmarking and finding an optimal model is a complex process, but it can result in significant savings. This post discusses how one team navigated the process to save thousands of dollars.

articles.title: THE TRAGEDY OF THE AGENTIC COMMONS
articles.summary: AI agents can improve matching markets, like dating or job searches, by using LLMs to convert unstructured preferences into actionable data, outperforming standard questionnaires. However, in markets where everyone uses AI agents, congestion increases significantly, reducing efficiency without a pricing mechanism. Introducing prices and institutional design can alleviate congestion, streamline coordination, and enhance market efficiency.

articles.title: MY AGENTS ARE WORKING. ARE YOURS?
articles.summary: AI agents are significantly increasing productivity by automating the analysis of thousands of research papers. A new anti-AI tool, Poison Fountain, corrupts AI training data to combat the perceived threat of machine intelligence.

articles.title: INWORLD RELEASES NEW TTS MODEL DESIGNED FOR THE NEXT WAVE OF CONSUMER AI APPLICATIONS
articles.summary: Inworld released TTS-1.5, building on their #1-ranked position on the Artificial Analysis leaderboard. The new model achieves sub-250ms P90 latency, enabling natural conversation at thousands of queries per second. With 30% greater expressiveness, 40% lower word error rates, and 25x lower cost than alternatives, TTS-1.5 is designed for developers building high-demand, realtime applications at consumer scale.

articles.title: Try TTS-1.5 [12] Learn More
INTRODUCING FASTMCP 3.0 🚀
articles.summary: FastMCP 3.0 was built to be as durable as it is future-proof. It moves beyond simple tool servers and enters the era of Context Applications: rich, adaptive systems that manage the information flow to agents. FastMCP 3.0 can source components from anywhere, compose and transform them freely, personalize what each user sees, track state across sessions, and more. The first beta is available now.

articles.title: REPO: CONTENT-AWARE ATTENTION REORDERING
articles.summary: RePo is a module that repositions tokens based on contextual relevance rather than fixed order, improving long-range attention and robustness to noisy or structured inputs. The method draws on Cognitive Load Theory to justify reorganizing input structure for more efficient model processing.

articles.title: DIFFERENTIAL TRANSFORMER V2
articles.summary: DIFF V2 features key upgrades over DIFF V1: faster inference via compatibility with FlashAttention, better training stability by removing per-head RMSNorm, and a simplified λ parameterization that eliminates complex initialization schemes.

articles.title: WAYPOINT-1: REAL-TIME INTERACTIVE VIDEO DIFFUSION FROM OVERWORLD
articles.summary: Waypoint-1 is a real-time-interactive video diffusion model. It can be controlled and prompted via text, mouse, and keyboard. Users can give the model some frames, run it, then have it create a world that they can interact with. They can move the camera freely with the mouse and input any key on the keyboard, all with zero latency. Each frame is generated with the controls as context. The model runs fast enough to provide a seamless experience, even on consumer hardware.

articles.title: AI GAINS STARTING TO SHOW IN THE REAL ECONOMY
articles.summary: The introduction of AI tools like Claude Cowork and Alibaba's Qwen Assistant marks a shift towards AI's real-world applications, similar to ChatGPT's accessibility impact. Recent data from Q3 2025 shows a 4.9% productivity jump, with minimal change in hours worked, indicating potential initial AI-driven efficiency gains. Despite early-stage adoption, these developments could significantly boost economic productivity and eventually increase living standards.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC CEO: SELLING H200S TO CHINA IS LIKE GIVING NUKES TO NORTH KOREA
articles.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei has likened the decision to allow Nvidia to sell GPUs to Chinese companies to giving nuclear weapons to an adversary. The Trump administration announced just over a month ago that it would allow shipments of Nvidia H200 accelerators to Chinese customers as long as the US received 25% of the revenues. Chinese authorities have yet to allow local buyers to acquire the GPUs. Anthropic wants stricter controls on AI exports, saying access to the chips would put Chinese model developers in a better position to compete with the West.

articles.title: FULLY REMOTE)
articles.summary: As the first engineer on TLDR's new Applied AI team, you'll build AI agents and composable Claude Skills to let non-technical teammates create their own AI workflows. Learn more [21].

articles.title: GOOGLE SAYS GEMINI WON'T HAVE ADS, AS CHATGPT PREPARES TO ADD THEM
articles.summary: While Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis has confirmed that Gemini won't get ads for now, Google has not confirmed that it will never add ads to Gemini.

articles.title: ELON MUSK SAYS TESLA'S RESTARTED DOJO3 WILL BE FOR ‘SPACE-BASED AI COMPUTE'
articles.summary: Tesla plans to restart its Dojo3 AI chip project focused on space-based AI compute.

articles.title: CHATGPT SELF PORTRAIT
articles.summary: ChatGPT's response to a prompt about user treatment often reflects the user's behavior and framing.

articles.title: GLM-4.7-FLASH
articles.summary: GLM-4.7-Flash is a 30B-class MoE model designed for local deployment in coding, agent tasks, translation, and creative writing.

articles.title: OPENAI ROLLS OUT AGE PREDICTION IN CHATGPT
articles.summary: OpenAI introduced an age prediction model for ChatGPT consumer accounts to help apply teen-specific safety protections.
